jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Scootsy
jsonLd.description:
We at Scootsy are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scootsy:
Scootsy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scootsy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
